title: carex pterocarpa
intro: Carex pterocarpa, also known as the umbrella-sedge or umbrella sedge, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). The plant is native to Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Carex pterocarpa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in digestion. Carex pterocarpa can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or dried and used in herbal supplements to harness its medicinal properties.
